collecting.url_missing: URL input missing both originalUrl and normalizedUrl
collecting.content_too_short: Collected content too short to extract meaningful knowledge points
collecting.content_too_long: Collected content too long ({length} characters, limit {limit}). Please manually trim the key portions and resubmit
collecting.input_too_long: Input content too long ({length} characters, limit {limit}). Please reduce and resubmit

comparing.no_matching_output: matchingOutput is null — matching step must run first

verifying.conflict: Verification conflict: pointKey {key} appears in both verifiedPointKeys and rejectedPointKeys, treating as rejected
verifying.omission: Verifier did not return a judgment for pointKey "{key}" (possible LLM response truncation), accepting by default
verifying.degraded: Verification round failed, skipping verification and storing directly: {message}

storing.source_confirmed_empty: Source processed but no knowledge output

translating.degraded: Translation step failed, originals will be used: {message}
translating.missing_translation: Translator returned no entry for id "{id}" — original kept

validation.alias_parse_failed: Failed to parse aliases for entity {id}, skipping alias dedup for this entity
validation.draft_name_match: draft "{name}" name matches existing entity [entity:{entityId}] "{entityName}", downgraded to reference
validation.draft_downgrade_warning: [draft→entity downgrade warning] entity:{entityId} has {count} active fact knowledge points, but this round's fact points were not LLM-compared (comparing stage ran as draft, all facts auto-judged as new)
validation.draft_alias_match: draft "{name}" name matches alias of existing entity "{entityName}", keeping as draft (alias match confidence insufficient)
validation.invalid_matched_id: matchedPointId {id} not in entity's existing knowledge points, downgrading to judgment='new'
validation.skipped_null_matched: judgment='skipped' but matchedPointId is null (pointKey: {key}), downgrading to judgment='new'
validation.category_empty: Draft entity category path is empty, using classifier suggestion: "{fallback}"
validation.category_depth_exceeded: Category path depth {depth} exceeds limit {limit}, truncated
validation.category_segment_long: Category path segment "{segment}..." exceeds {limit} characters, truncated
validation.category_empty_after_norm: Category path is empty after normalization, using classifier suggestion: "{fallback}"
validation.relation_invalid_ref: Relation dropped: entityKey not found (source={source}, target={target})
validation.relation_dedup: Relation dropped: duplicate after promotion ({source} → {target}, type={type})

llm.schema_validation: LLM schema validation failed for step "{step}": {message}
llm.rate_limit: Rate limit exceeded for step "{step}" after {retries} retries: {message}
llm.timeout: LLM call timeout for step "{step}" after {timeoutSeconds}s: {message}

intent_tracking.pending_pipeline_assistant_text: Waiting for the source analysis to finish before setting up tracking
intent_tracking.pending_multi_entity_assistant_text: Please pick which subject to track

intent_classifier.wait_indicator_im_text: Waiting for more context ({seconds}s — keep typing, or /release to run now, /cancel to drop it)

tracking.failed_no_entity_assistant_text: Could not extract an entity from that source, so no tracking was set up. Tell me directly what you want to track.
tracking.failed_source_pipeline_assistant_text: The source failed to process, so tracking cannot be set up from it.
tracking.awaiting_clarify_assistant_text: Found multiple entities — pick which one to track:
tracking.awaiting_clarify_timeout_assistant_text: The previous entity choice was not confirmed within 24 hours and has been dropped. Start the tracking request again if you still need it.
